name: Avatar group
when_to_use: 需要在交付物页、项目摘要或团队卡片中紧凑展示一组参与者，并把超出名额折叠成 “+N” 时用它。适合负责人、评审人、活跃协作者和客户小组；如果需要成员搜索、权限编辑、拖拽排序或把选择回传给 AI，应改用人员选择器或数据表。
why_valuable: 重叠头像看似简单，实际要处理缩写回退、颜色索引、遮罩边缘、可访问名称、容器变窄和溢出计数；手写版本常在不同头像尺寸下露出背景缝隙或算错 +N。Vaadin 的 avatar-group 把这些细节、自适应测量和溢出菜单封装在已注册的 Web Component 中。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to show a group of participants compactly on a deliverable page, project summary, or team card, folding extra people into "+N". It suits owners, reviewers, active collaborators, and client groups; for member search, permission editing, drag reordering, or sending selections back to AI, use a people picker or data table instead.
en.why_valuable: Overlapping avatars look simple but must handle abbreviation fallback, color indexing, masked edges, accessible names, narrowing containers, and overflow counts. Hand-written versions often expose background gaps at different avatar sizes or miscalculate +N. Vaadin's avatar-group packages these details, responsive measurement, and an overflow menu in a registered Web Component.

data_in.note: boot maps items directly to <vaadin-avatar-group>.items, retaining only the upstream-supported name/img/abbr/colorIndex fields. name serves both as the accessible label and the abbreviation fallback. The example uses only abbreviations and built-in colors, with no avatar requests. When img is supplied, the browser loads it as a normal image URL; strict hosts should prefer a data: URL.

schema.title?: string - card title; displays "Project team" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string - context for the group, such as its responsibility or current phase
schema.items: {name?:string,img?:string,abbr?:string,colorIndex?:number}[] - person records; name is the full name, img is the avatar URL, abbr is an explicit abbreviation, and colorIndex selects a Vaadin theme color slot
schema.maxItemsVisible?: number - maximum avatar slots shown by the component, including the final "+N" overflow avatar; rounded to an integer and at least 2, default 5
schema.size?: number - avatar diameter in px, clamped to 36-72, default 58
schema.overlap?: number - overlap between adjacent avatars in px, clamped to 0-24, default 14

spec.note: The wrapper card grows naturally with its title and one avatar row. Avatars default to 58px, and Vaadin collapses more items automatically when the container is too narrow. No external theme CSS, fonts, vh, or percentage heights.

data_in.note: boot 将 items 原样映射到 <vaadin-avatar-group>.items，只保留上游支持的 name/img/abbr/colorIndex 字段。name 同时用于可访问标签与缩写回退；示例只用缩写和内置颜色，不请求头像资源。传 img 时浏览器会按普通图片 URL 加载，严格宿主建议使用 data: URL。

schema.title?: string —— 卡片标题；省略时显示 “Project team”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 人员组上下文，例如职责或当前阶段
schema.items: {name?:string,img?:string,abbr?:string,colorIndex?:number}[] —— 人员记录；name 为全名，img 为头像 URL，abbr 为显式缩写，colorIndex 选择 Vaadin 主题色槽
schema.maxItemsVisible?: number —— 组件最多展示的头像位数量，包含最后一个 “+N” 溢出头像；取整且至少 2，默认 5
schema.size?: number —— 头像直径 px，夹在 36–72，默认 58
schema.overlap?: number —— 相邻头像重叠 px，夹在 0–24，默认 14

spec.note: 包装卡片随标题和一行头像自然增高；头像默认 58px，容器宽度不足时 Vaadin 会进一步自动折叠。无外部主题 CSS、字体、vh 或百分比高度。

minimal.title: Release crew
minimal.subtitle: Design, engineering, research, and launch owners currently shaping the final handoff.

uplink: display-only；不把头像或 “+N” 的本地展开动作回传给 AI，也不提供成员编辑。消费 AI 若需要选择语义，应另接专用人员选择器。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 Playwright sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；custom element 完成注册，7 条 records 按 maxItemsVisible=5 显示为 4 个彩色重叠头像 + “+3”，无 console/page/request 错误，也无运行时 fetch/XHR/image/font 请求
carriers.widget: supported:组件自身带 shadow，包装再用自有 shadow；25.2.5 入口内建基础/Lumo 注入，不需要运行时主题或 i18n fetch
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证 artifact boot 相同；示例无远程头像、字体或 connect-src 运行时请求

isolation.evidence: @vaadin/avatar-group@25.2.5 /+esm 尾部确认 AvatarGroup named export，并调用 defineCustomElement 注册 <vaadin-avatar-group>；类型文件确认 items 支持 name/abbr/img/colorIndex，maxItemsVisible 为 number。v25 入口通过 LumoInjectionMixin(includeBaseStyles:true) 把基础主题带进组件 shadow，不 fetch 外部 CSS、字体或 i18n。静态展示只写包装 shadow 与组件自身 shadow；点击 +N 时上游 overlay 会临时使用文档级 overlay 容器并注册关闭/焦点监听，因此全局 DOM/事件标为 conditional。传远程 img 会产生普通图片请求，example 刻意只用 abbr + colorIndex。
